prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
Spanish: 'El mejor momento para plantar una arbolito fue hace veinte años. El segundo mejor momento es ahora.' - This proverb encourages people to act on their intentions, regardless of the time that has passed.

French: 'Le meilleur moment pour planter un arbre est arrivé il y a vingt ans. Le deuxième meilleur est aujourd'hui.' - This proverb reminds us that it's never too late to make a positive impact, even if we missed opportunities in the past.
